section_miscategorizations.text: Order an echocardiogram to assess the severity of mitral regurgitation and ejection fraction.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This would normally be appropriate in the Plan, but it conflicts with the Objective section where an echocardiogram has already been performed and results are documented. The issue is internal note inconsistency rather than pure section misplacement, so it is marked as a minor organizational problem.
